scripts.build: npm run preview:preflight && npm run build -w @possible/knowledge && npm run build -w @possible/mcp && npm run build -w @possible/web && npm run build -w @possible/evals
scripts.test: npm run test -w @possible/knowledge && npm run test -w @possible/mcp && npm run test -w @possible/web && npm run test:data -w @possible/web && npm run test -w @possible/evals
scripts.preview:build: npm run preview:preflight && npm run build -w @possible/knowledge && npm run build -w @possible/web
scripts.preview:prepare: npm run preview:build && npm run preview:test && npm run preview:verify
scripts.check: npm run knowledge:validate && npm run skill:validate && npm run test && npm run build && npm run preview:test && npm run preview:verify && npm run eval
